raw_output:
PR #128 review (Claude, Fable 5) — Group 1: Correctness / process

P1 — The PR's own CI is red: the new hash test cannot run in the backend jobs' shallow checkout. test_review_gate.py:144 calls compute_diff_hash("origin/dev"); backend jobs use default shallow checkout where origin/dev does not exist -> CalledProcessError. Confirmed on live run 29799882563: backend (3.11) and (3.12) both fail on exactly this test.

P2 — Diff hash is not byte-stable across git configurations; the "flags pinned" claim is false. Verified empirically: GIT_EXTERNAL_DIFF=/bin/true -> hash becomes sha256 of empty string (missing --no-ext-diff); diff.noprefix=true -> different hash; core.abbrev=16 -> different hash (missing --full-index); diff.algorithm unpinned; text=True locale decode can raise UnicodeDecodeError on non-ASCII diffs — hash raw bytes.

P3 — Malformed artifacts crash with a raw traceback instead of a diagnostic (fail-closed, verified: uncaught exception -> exit 1 -> CI fails; no fail-open exists). Non-dict findings entries and top-level non-dict unexercised by tests; leg-type mismatch IS caught; extra unknown .json ignored (harmless); duplicate finding ids unchecked (audit nit).

P3 — dev->main release PRs are now in scope: gate runs with --base origin/main, requiring a fresh 4-leg battery over the entire release diff. Confirm intended.

P3 — Schema enforcement looser than spec: severity_claimed not checked against enum; model/reviewed_at empty strings pass; raw_output: false passes.

Nits: (a) scripts/** per-file-ignores inert — CI lints only backend alembic, so the gate script sits outside lint/format/mypy coverage; (b) branch protection must gain review-gate at merge (admin); (c) review-gate job fails only on missing pr-128 dir — expected bootstrap.

Tests: pytest backend/tests/test_review_gate.py --no-cov -q -> 14 passed exit 0 locally (see P1 for CI). origin/base_ref IS resolvable in the review-gate job (fetch-depth 0 fetches all branches with explicit head-sha ref) — verified on the live run.

--- RE-ATTESTATION 2026-07-21 (hash e4bc416b...) ---
Delta since prior attestation (8013afe9...): exactly one file, docs/process/review-gate.md, 5+/4- within the Scope-note paragraph — records the owner decision (Kristov 2026-07-21) that release PRs keep the full battery. Delta re-review: paragraph accurate and consistent with spec + CLAUDE.md; no other tracked doc still calls the question open; zero code files changed. Findings: none.

--- RE-ATTESTATION 3 2026-07-21 (owner-run Codex pass, 5 findings triaged) ---
Delta since prior attestation: type-guard fix in review_gate.py (+2 tests), spec residual sharpening (skipped-check success mode + workflows/gate-script escalation rule + up-to-date-branches recommendation + findings[] canonicality), ship-v4 escalation entry (untracked). Full triage in the PR conversation.

findings.summary: Hash test depends on origin/dev, absent in shallow backend CI checkouts — PR's own backend checks red
findings.reason: Confirmed on live run 29799882563. Fixed: test uses HEAD (always resolvable, same subprocess path).

findings.summary: Diff hash not byte-stable across git configs (ext-diff, noprefix, core.abbrev, locale decode)
findings.reason: Reproduced all four divergences. Fixed: -c pins + --no-ext-diff --full-index, raw-bytes hashing; verified immune to GIT_EXTERNAL_DIFF.

findings.summary: Malformed artifacts (non-dict findings, top-level array) crash with tracebacks instead of diagnostics
findings.reason: Fail-closed either way (verified), but useless output. Fixed: typed checks with per-leg messages + 7 new tests.

findings.summary: dev→main release PRs now require a fresh 4-leg battery over the whole release diff
findings.reason: Policy question, not a defect: 'no exemptions' is the owner's explicit call; strict behavior stands and the question is escalated to Kristov in the spec's Scope note + PR conversation.

findings.summary: Schema enforcement looser than spec (severity_claimed unchecked; empty model/reviewed_at; non-string raw_output passes)
findings.reason: Enum + type + non-empty checks added; spec's 'parseable against the schema' now true.

findings.summary: scripts/ outside CI lint/format/mypy coverage (per-file-ignores inert)
findings.reason: Backend CI job now runs ruff check/format + mypy over scripts/.

findings.summary: Branch protection must gain review-gate required check at merge
findings.reason: Requires repo-admin token the orchestrator lacks (403 verified); manual instructions handed to owner alongside the e2e check.
